rag_explanation: AI Investigation (High CPU + rapid file changes indicate ransomware): The system is exhibiting classic ransomware traits: mass file modifications coupled with high CPU utilization, indicative of an ongoing encryption process.
recommended_action: Isolate the system from the network immediately and initiate a secure backup to prevent further data loss.
